technology.title: The AI Era Is Creating a Bug Hunting Arms Race
technology.summary: As attackers ramp up their AI exploit development, the search for software vulnerabilities is changing rapidly.

briefing.news_focus: As attackers ramp up their AI exploit development, the search for software vulnerabilities is changing rapidly.
briefing.news_focus_zh: 隨著攻擊者加速開發人工智慧（AI）利用工具，軟體漏洞的搜尋方式正在迅速變化。這種變化促使了業界在漏洞獵捕方面的競爭加劇，形成了一場新的武器競賽，對於安全專家和攻擊者而言，皆需不斷提升技術以應對日益複雜的威脅。
briefing.background: 在數位化快速發展的背景下，AI技術的進步使得攻擊者能夠更有效地發現和利用軟體中的漏洞。過去，漏洞獵捕主要依賴人工檢測和傳統的安全測試方法，但隨著AI的引入，這一過程變得更加自動化和高效。這不僅改變了攻擊者的策略，也迫使企業和安全專家必須加強防護措施，以應對新型的AI驅動攻擊。
briefing.analysis: 隨著AI技術的普及，攻擊者利用AI工具進行漏洞開發的能力顯著提升，這使得漏洞獵捕的競爭變得更加激烈。企業和安全專家必須不斷更新其防禦策略，以應對這種新型的威脅。此外，這一趨勢可能導致安全行業的資源重新分配，更多資金和人力將投入到AI安全技術的開發中。未來，若攻擊者持續優化其AI利用工具，可能會使得漏洞獵捕的難度進一步增加，進而影響整體的網路安全環境。

technology.title: Hang Seng Index review to boost market capitalisation by 4.5%: Goldman Sachs
technology.summary: The latest quarterly review of the Hang Seng Index will likely boost the capitalisation of the benchmark of Hong Kong stocks by 4.5 per cent and attract buying of stock including Tencent Holdings and BeOne Medicine, according to Goldman Sachs. The market capitalisation of the Hang Seng Index is expected to rise to US$2.15 trillion after the review result showed on Friday that biotech firm BeOne Medicine, Aluminum Crop of China (Chalco) and parcel delivery firm J&T Global Express would join the...

briefing.news_focus: The latest quarterly review of the Hang Seng Index will likely boost the capitalisation of the benchmark of Hong Kong stocks by 4.5 per cent and attract buying of stock including Tencent Holdings and BeOne Medicine, according to Goldman Sachs. The market capitalisation of the Hang Seng Index is expected to rise to US$2.15 trillion after the review result showed on Friday that biotech firm BeOne Medicine, Aluminum Crop of China (Chalco) and parcel delivery firm J&T Global Express would join the...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 根據高盛的報告，香港恒生指數的最新季度檢討將使市場資本化提高4.5%。這一變化預計將吸引對包括騰訊控股和BeOne Medicine在內的股票的購買。檢討結果顯示，生技公司BeOne Medicine、中國鋁業公司（Chalco）以及包裹快遞公司J&T Global Express將加入恒生指數，預計恒生指數的市場資本化將達到2.15萬億美元。
briefing.background: 恒生指數是香港股市的主要指標，反映了香港經濟的健康狀況。每季度的檢討會影響指數成分股的選擇，進而影響市場資本化和投資者的信心。近期，隨著全球經濟逐步復甦，香港市場吸引了更多的外資流入。高盛的預測顯示，這次檢討不僅會提升市場資本化，還可能改變投資者對特定行業的看法，尤其是在生技和科技領域。
briefing.analysis: 此次恒生指數的檢討將對市場產生顯著影響，尤其是對騰訊控股和BeOne Medicine等公司的股價。高盛的預測暗示，這些公司的加入將吸引更多的資金流入，進一步推動股價上漲。市場參與者可能會密切關注這些公司的表現，以評估其未來增長潛力。此外，這一變化也可能引發其他公司對加入恒生指數的興趣，進一步促進香港股市的活躍度。整體而言，這次檢討不僅是對指數的調整，更是對香港市場未來發展的一次重要信號。

technology.title: A Probe Took Incredible Pictures of Mars on Its Way to a Far-Off Asteroid
technology.summary: NASA took advantage of the recent close approach of the Psyche probe to Mars to calibrate its observation instruments.

briefing.news_focus: NASA took advantage of the recent close approach of the Psyche probe to Mars to calibrate its observation instruments.
briefing.news_focus_zh: NASA利用Psyche探測器最近接近火星的機會，對其觀測儀器進行了校準，並拍攝了火星的驚人照片。這一過程不僅有助於提高探測器的觀測能力，也為未來的任務提供了重要的數據支持。
briefing.background: Psyche探測器是NASA的一個重要任務，旨在探索位於小行星帶中的Psyche小行星。該小行星被認為是由金屬組成，可能提供有關行星形成的關鍵信息。此次接近火星的過程，不僅是一次技術上的挑戰，也是對探測器性能的實際測試。火星作為太陽系內研究最為深入的行星之一，其環境和地質特徵為其他行星的研究提供了參考。
briefing.analysis: 此次NASA利用Psyche探測器接近火星的機會進行儀器校準，顯示出該機構在太空探索任務中對技術準確性的重視。這一行動不僅有助於提升Psyche探測器的觀測能力，也可能為未來的科學研究提供更為精確的數據。隨著太空探索技術的進步，其他國家和私營企業也在積極開展類似的任務，這可能會引發更激烈的競爭。NASA的這一行動可能會促使其他國家加快其太空探索計劃，尤其是在小行星和其他行星的研究上。

politics.title: The language of the American presidency doesn’t apply to Trump | Robert Reich
politics.summary: Trump and his allies have so undermined the US government that we need a new vocabulary to describe them Words matter. When describing a government, they inevitably carry moral weight. Over the past 16 months, Trump and his appointees have so profoundly undermined the United States government that different words should be used to describe them than have been used to describe all previous administrations. Robert Reich, a former US secretary of labor, is a professor of public policy emeritus at the University of California, Berkeley. He is a Guardian US columnist and his newsletter is at robertreich.substack.com . His new book, Coming Up Short: A Memoir of My America, is out now in the US and in the UK Continue reading...

briefing.news_focus: Trump and his allies have so undermined the US government that we need a new vocabulary to describe them Words matter. When describing a government, they inevitably carry moral weight. Over the past 16 months, Trump and his appointees have so profoundly undermined the United States government that different words should be used to describe them than have been used to describe all previous administrations. Robert Reich, a former US secretary of labor, is a professor of public policy emeritus at the University of California, Berkeley. He is a Guardian US columnist and his newsletter is at robertreich.substack.com . His new book, Coming Up Short: A Memoir of My America, is out now in the US and in the UK Continue reading...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 前美國勞工部長羅伯特·賴希在《衛報》上發表文章，指出特朗普及其盟友對美國政府的破壞程度已達到需要重新定義用語的地步。他認為，描述特朗普政府的語言應與以往任何政府不同，因為這些詞彙承載著道德意義，反映出特朗普政府的獨特性與危險性。
briefing.background: 特朗普政府自2016年上任以來，對美國政治體系的影響引發了廣泛的爭議與討論。許多觀察者認為，特朗普及其支持者的行為不僅挑戰了傳統的政治規範，還對民主制度造成了潛在威脅。賴希的觀點反映了部分學者與政治評論員對特朗普政府的批評，認為其行為已經超越了以往政府的範疇，需用新的語言來描述其影響。
briefing.analysis: 賴希的觀點強調了特朗普政府與以往政府之間的根本差異，這在當前美國政治中引發了激烈的辯論。支持特朗普的人士可能會反駁賴希的說法，認為特朗普的政策和風格是對傳統政治的必要挑戰，並且有助於促進經濟增長和國家安全。然而，賴希的論點則指出，這種挑戰可能會破壞民主制度的基礎，並對政府的公信力造成長期影響。隨著美國政治的分裂加劇，未來對於特朗普及其政府的評價將持續成為焦點，並可能影響即將到來的選舉結果。

politics.title: Trump’s overseas application for US green card rule unnerves Asian workers
politics.summary: A new US immigration policy could force many green card applicants to leave the country and apply from abroad, disrupting families, careers and long-term settlement plans for Asian workers already facing years-long backlogs for visas. US Citizenship and Immigration Services said on May 22 that it would only grant “adjustment of status” – the process that allows prospective immigrants already in the US to apply for permanent residence without leaving the country – in “extraordinary...

briefing.news_focus: A new US immigration policy could force many green card applicants to leave the country and apply from abroad, disrupting families, careers and long-term settlement plans for Asian workers already facing years-long backlogs for visas. US Citizenship and Immigration Services said on May 22 that it would only grant “adjustment of status” – the process that allows prospective immigrants already in the US to apply for permanent residence without leaving the country – in “extraordinary...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 美國公民及移民服務局於5月22日宣布，新的移民政策將迫使許多綠卡申請者必須離開美國，並在國外重新申請，這對於已經面臨多年簽證積壓的亞洲工人而言，將造成家庭、職業及長期定居計劃的重大干擾。此政策僅在「特殊情況」下才會允許在美國境內進行身份調整，這引發了廣泛的擔憂。
briefing.background: 美國的移民政策一直是政治辯論的焦點，尤其是在特朗普政府期間，對移民的限制措施頻繁出現。亞洲工人，特別是來自印度和中國的科技專業人士，通常依賴H-1B簽證和後續的綠卡申請。由於簽證配額的限制，這些工人面臨著長達數年的等待時間。新的政策可能會進一步加劇這一問題，迫使許多家庭面臨分離的風險，並影響他們的職業發展和生活安排。
briefing.analysis: 這項新政策可能會引發亞洲社群的強烈反彈，因為許多工人已經在美國建立了穩固的生活和職業基礎。對於那些在美國工作多年但仍在等待綠卡的工人來說，這一變化可能意味著他們需要重新評估自己的職業路徑和家庭安排。企業也可能受到影響，因為他們依賴這些高技能工人來填補技術空缺。此政策的實施可能會導致人才流失，並使美國在全球科技競爭中處於不利地位。各方可能會對此政策提出法律挑戰，進一步引發政治爭論。

politics.title: Why Trump’s draft peace pact with Iran threatens Netanyahu’s Middle East plans
politics.summary: For decades, Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu has preached a mantra of peace and stability in the Middle East through the destruction of Iran’s Islamic Republic. The obliteration of the ayatollahs, he prophesied, would lead to the normalisation of relations between Israel and the wider Arab-Islamic world – with Israel emerging as the Middle East’s dominant power and indispensable security provider. But on Saturday, Netanyahu’s dreams looked set to be dashed, after US President Donald...

briefing.news_focus: For decades, Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu has preached a mantra of peace and stability in the Middle East through the destruction of Iran’s Islamic Republic. The obliteration of the ayatollahs, he prophesied, would lead to the normalisation of relations between Israel and the wider Arab-Islamic world – with Israel emerging as the Middle East’s dominant power and indispensable security provider. But on Saturday, Netanyahu’s dreams looked set to be dashed, after US President Donald...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 美國總統特朗普提出的草案和平協議與伊朗的關係，可能會威脅以色列總理內塔尼亞胡在中東的計畫。內塔尼亞胡長期以來主張通過摧毀伊朗的伊斯蘭共和國來實現中東的和平與穩定，並預測這將促進以色列與阿拉伯-伊斯蘭世界的正常化關係，讓以色列成為中東的主導力量。然而，特朗普的和平提案可能會使內塔尼亞胡的夢想受到衝擊。
briefing.background: 內塔尼亞胡的政策長期以來專注於削弱伊朗的影響力，認為摧毀伊朗政權是實現中東和平的關鍵。他的策略不僅涉及軍事行動，還包括與阿拉伯國家的外交接觸，試圖建立聯盟以對抗伊朗的擴張。隨著特朗普政府提出的和平協議，這一局勢可能會改變，因為該協議可能會促使美國與伊朗之間的關係緩和，這對內塔尼亞胡的計畫構成挑戰。
briefing.analysis: 特朗普的和平協議可能會使以色列在中東的地位受到威脅，因為這可能會減少以色列對抗伊朗的正當性。內塔尼亞胡的計畫依賴於持續的地緣政治緊張局勢，以便強化以色列的安全需求和外交關係。然而，若美伊關係改善，可能會使阿拉伯國家對以色列的依賴減少，從而影響以色列的戰略利益。此外，這一協議也可能引發以色列內部的政治爭議，因為反對派可能會利用此機會質疑內塔尼亞胡的外交政策有效性。

economy.title: The world is heading toward a financial crisis – the state of US politics has left us ill-prepared
economy.summary: Trump’s second term has revealed that Washington’s policy response to such a crisis will be misguided and full of chaos A bona fide financial crisis has not broken out since the US housing meltdown of 2007. Even the Covid pandemic and subsequent upsurge in inflation didn’t lead to financial upheaval. The jitters produced by the collapse of Silicon Valley Bank in 2023 were soon forgotten. Given this stability, it might take some effort to convince financial markets that another big one is around the corner. But it is. Financial markets and their regulating governments may believe they have acquired immunity, but the world is careening toward a moment of financial upheaval that could well dwarf the damage caused by the last one. Continue reading...

briefing.news_focus: Trump’s second term has revealed that Washington’s policy response to such a crisis will be misguided and full of chaos A bona fide financial crisis has not broken out since the US housing meltdown of 2007. Even the Covid pandemic and subsequent upsurge in inflation didn’t lead to financial upheaval. The jitters produced by the collapse of Silicon Valley Bank in 2023 were soon forgotten. Given this stability, it might take some effort to convince financial markets that another big one is around the corner. But it is. Financial markets and their regulating governments may believe they have acquired immunity, but the world is careening toward a moment of financial upheaval that could well dwarf the damage caused by the last one. Continue reading...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 根據《The Guardian Business》的報導，隨著特朗普的第二任期，華盛頓對潛在金融危機的政策反應被認為將是錯誤且混亂的。儘管自2007年美國房地產崩潰以來，尚未發生真正的金融危機，但專家警告，全球正朝向一場可能超過以往危機損害的金融動盪。儘管市場目前看似穩定，專家認為，金融市場和監管機構的自滿可能使其對即將來臨的危機缺乏準備。
briefing.background: 自2007年以來，全球金融體系經歷了多次挑戰，包括新冠疫情和隨之而來的通脹上升，但未導致重大金融崩潰。特別是2023年矽谷銀行的倒閉事件，雖然引發市場波動，但隨後迅速被遺忘。這種穩定感使得市場參與者對未來的風險評估過於樂觀。特朗普政府的政策走向，尤其是在經濟管理上，可能會對未來的金融穩定性造成負面影響，進一步加劇市場的不安。
briefing.analysis: 各方對於即將來臨的金融危機的看法存在分歧。《The Guardian》指出，特朗普政府的政策反應將是混亂的，這可能使市場在危機來臨時缺乏有效應對措施。而《The Economist》則強調，歐洲面臨的問題不僅是可負擔性，還包括可用性危機，這與嚴格的監管有關，暗示市場結構性問題可能加劇金融危機的風險。這表明，儘管美國和歐洲的情況不同，但都面臨著政策和市場結構的挑戰，未來的金融穩定性依然岌岌可危。

supporting_titles: Forget affordability. Europe has an availability crisis
supporting_summaries: Tight regulation is largely to blame

economy.title: As Chinese EV makers expand in Europe, are local automotive suppliers set to benefit?
economy.summary: European automotive suppliers are set to benefit from an influx of Chinese carmakers, thanks to growing demand for electric vehicles (EVs) and persistent local protectionism, according to Vulcan Energy Resources, a lithium and renewable energy producer in Germany. Chinese EV makers – from BYD to Xpeng – are planning to aggressively expand into Europe in search of higher profit margins, even as Brussels advances measures to protect local manufacturing amid a slower pace of electrification. On...

briefing.news_focus: European automotive suppliers are set to benefit from an influx of Chinese carmakers, thanks to growing demand for electric vehicles (EVs) and persistent local protectionism, according to Vulcan Energy Resources, a lithium and renewable energy producer in Germany. Chinese EV makers – from BYD to Xpeng – are planning to aggressively expand into Europe in search of higher profit margins, even as Brussels advances measures to protect local manufacturing amid a slower pace of electrification. On...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 隨著中國電動車製造商如比亞迪和小鵬汽車計劃在歐洲市場積極擴張，歐洲汽車供應商預計將受益於這股潮流。根據德國鋰和可再生能源生產商Vulcan Energy Resources的報導，這一擴張是由於對電動車需求的增長以及當地持續的保護主義措施所驅動。儘管布魯塞爾推進保護本地製造業的措施，但中國企業仍然尋求更高的利潤率。
briefing.background: 在全球電動車市場快速增長的背景下，中國汽車製造商正尋求在歐洲市場獲得更大的份額。歐洲各國政府對於本地製造業的保護主義政策日益加強，這使得當地供應商在面對外來競爭時，能夠獲得一定的市場優勢。此外，歐洲的電動車需求持續上升，促使中國製造商加速進入這一市場，以尋求更高的利潤。這一情況也反映出全球電動車產業鏈的變化，尤其是在原材料和零部件供應方面。
briefing.analysis: 中國電動車製造商的擴張對歐洲汽車供應商而言，既是挑戰也是機遇。雖然中國企業可能會帶來更強的競爭壓力，但當地供應商也能因應需求增長而受益。根據Vulcan Energy Resources的觀察，隨著中國品牌進入市場，當地供應商有機會參與到更高價值的供應鏈中。此外，歐洲的保護主義政策可能會進一步促進本地供應商的發展，因為這些政策旨在保護本地產業免受外來競爭的影響。未來，若中國企業能夠有效地融入當地市場，可能會促進技術交流和合作，但也需面對歐洲消費者對於品牌和品質的要求。

economy.title: CSRC’s crackdown on cross-border trading involves US$32b in Hong Kong assets: Citic
economy.summary: Investors may find out how Hong Kong’s stock market will react to mainland China’s crackdown on illegal cross-border securities trading on Tuesday, as Citic Securities estimates an impact on as much as HK$250 billion (US$31.9 billion) of assets in the city, a negligible amount for the third-largest stock market in Asia. The sweeping campaign may affect between HK$150 billion to HK$180 billion worth of assets owned by mainland Chinese investors with Hong Kong stock accounts at Futu Securities...

briefing.news_focus: Investors may find out how Hong Kong’s stock market will react to mainland China’s crackdown on illegal cross-border securities trading on Tuesday, as Citic Securities estimates an impact on as much as HK$250 billion (US$31.9 billion) of assets in the city, a negligible amount for the third-largest stock market in Asia. The sweeping campaign may affect between HK$150 billion to HK$180 billion worth of assets owned by mainland Chinese investors with Hong Kong stock accounts at Futu Securities...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 中國證券監督管理委員會（CSRC）對跨境交易的打擊行動，可能影響香港市場約2500億港元（約319億美元）的資產。根據中信證券的估計，這一行動將對持有香港股票賬戶的內地投資者造成影響，資產損失預計在1500億至1800億港元之間。市場對此反應將在星期二揭曉，這對於亞洲第三大股市的影響被認為是微不足道的。
briefing.background: 香港作為亞洲主要金融中心，一直以來吸引著大量的內地投資者。隨著中國政府加強對跨境資本流動的監管，特別是在證券交易方面，香港市場的運作面臨新的挑戰。CSRC的打擊行動反映了中國政府對資本外流的擔憂，並試圖透過嚴格的監管來維護金融穩定。這一政策背景下，香港的金融機構和投資者需重新評估其投資策略，以應對可能的資產流動風險。
stakeholders: 中國證券監督管理委員會
briefing.analysis: CSRC的行動對於香港股市的影響雖然被認為是有限的，但仍然引發了市場的關注。中信證券的估計顯示，受影響的資產主要來自內地投資者，這可能會導致資金流出香港市場。此外，參考報導中提到的香港金融活力回升的情況，顯示出儘管面臨監管挑戰，香港仍在吸引更多的交易和投資。不同報導的重點在於，Nikkei Asia強調AI如何改變零售投資者的交易方式，而The Economist則聚焦於香港金融市場的恢復勢頭，這些都可能影響投資者的信心和行為。未來，香港市場可能需要在監管與吸引資本之間找到平衡。
